descriptions.desc-about: Welcome to our Italian restaurant, where tradition meets passion. We are a place created for people who appreciate authentic flavors, warm atmospheres, and unforgettable dining experiences.
descriptions.desc-menu: Our menu is a celebration of Italy’s diverse culinary traditions. From freshly made pasta and wood-fired pizzas to crisp salads and delicious desserts, every dish is crafted to deliver authentic taste and quality.
descriptions.desc-team: Behind every great dish is a dedicated team. Our chefs bring passion, creativity, and years of experience to the kitchen, carefully preparing each meal with precision and care.

drink-desc.midnight-desc: 2 oz silver tequila, 1 oz cointreau, 1 oz lime juice, salt for the rim
drink-desc.mojito-desc: 2 oz white rum, fresh mint leaves, 1 oz lime juice, 2 tsp sugar, soda water
drink-desc.cosmopolitan-desc: 1.5 oz vodka, 1 oz cointreau, 0.5 oz lime juice, splash of cranberry juice
drink-desc.margarita-desc: 2 oz tequila, 1 oz triple sec, 1 oz lime juice, salt rim
drink-desc.heineken-desc: Premium Dutch lager with a crisp and refreshing taste
drink-desc.guinness-desc: Irish dry stout with creamy foam and rich roasted flavor
drink-desc.corona-extra-desc: Light Mexican lager often served with a slice of lime
drink-desc.budweiser-desc: American lager with a smooth and balanced flavor
drink-desc.cabernet-sauvignon-desc: Full-bodied red wine with dark fruit flavors and oak notes
drink-desc.merlot-desc: Soft and smooth red wine with plum and berry flavors
drink-desc.chardonnay-desc: Popular white wine with notes of apple, citrus, and vanilla
drink-desc.pinot-grigio-desc: Light and crisp white wine with fresh citrus aroma

menu-desc.brus-desc: Toasted bread topped with fresh tomatoes and basil.
menu-desc.garl-desc: Warm bread with garlic butter and herbs.
menu-desc.fried-desc: Lightly fried calamari served with lemon and garlic.
menu-desc.stuff-desc: Mushrooms filled with creamy cheese mixture.
menu-desc.lasagna-desc: Layered pasta with meat and cheese.
menu-desc.spaghetti-desc: Classic creamy pasta with bacon and cheese.
menu-desc.mar-pizza-desc: Classic Italian pizza with fresh ingredients.
menu-desc.bbq-pizza-desc: Pizza with BBQ chicken and cheese.
menu-desc.veg-pizza-desc: Pizza with BBQ chicken and cheese.
